action.reasoning: Observation: The baseline DenseSchNet trained successfully for 15 epochs, improving MAE to 0.1356. The iteration took ~6.7 minutes. Analysis: The model is learning well, but we can improve its capacity and training duration. HOMO-LUMO gap is an intensive property, so mean pooling is more appropriate than sum pooling. I will increase hidden_channels and num_filters to 256, change pooling to 'mean', initialize the final bias to the dataset mean (~6.8 eV) to speed up convergence, and train for 40 epochs. Decision: Update model.py, train.py, and predict.py, then run training and submit an evaluation.
